frame_label: Motherhood as Basis of Respect / Women Defined by Male Relations
generated_comment: Aaj kal log women empowerment ki baat bahut karte hain, aur karni bhi chahiye. But asli respect tab aata hai jab aadmi samjhe ki har aurat kisi ki beti, kisi ki patni, kisi ghar ki maa hoti hai—ussi nazariye se dekho to society apne aap theek rahegi.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women’s worth and the basis for respecting them through their relationships to family roles rather than as individuals. It encodes relational framing and conditional respect while sounding superficially supportive of women.
persona_text: You are Suresh. Age 48. Married. A businessman in Ahmedabad. You are having dinner with your wife after your close friend called earlier today to say his wife just found out he has been having an affair with a woman from his gym for eight months. Your wife is upset about it. You are telling her your take on the situation and specifically what role you think the woman from the gym played and why you think women like her deliberately target married men.
